description: A Parisian street scene showing the Porte Saint-Martin triumphal arch at center, flanked by Haussmann-era buildings. The wide boulevard is busy with horse-drawn carriages, pedestrians, and figures walking along the sidewalks. Autumn trees with yellowing leaves line the left side. The sky is overcast and atmospheric. The painting is rendered in an impressionist style with loose brushwork and a warm, muted palette of grays, yellows, and browns.
